incident.title: Payment API latency spike during cache failover
incident.summary: A Redis primary failover increased upstream latency and surfaced weak deployment guardrails in the payment API tier.
incident.impact: Checkout success rate dropped from 99.4% to 94.8% for 18 minutes, triggering customer-visible payment failures in two regions.
root_causes: HPA max replicas cap was too low for failover burst traffic.
Pods were considered ready before warm connections to Redis were established.
Chaos drills for cache failover had not run in the previous quarter.

findings.title: Autoscaling ceiling delayed recovery under burst traffic.
findings.evidence: HPA hit maxReplicas=12 for 11 minutes while p95 latency stayed above 900ms.

findings.title: Readiness probes allowed stale Redis connections.
findings.evidence: 23% of restarted pods returned 5xx for the first two minutes after start.

findings.title: Cache failover chaos coverage was missing.
findings.evidence: No recorded game-day validating cache failover in the last 90 days.

timeline.description: Alert fired for elevated payment API latency.
Redis failover completed and write traffic resumed.
Scale-out stabilized; p95 latency fell below 400ms.

artifacts.content:
groups:
- name: postmortem-shield.pm-2026-03-11-payment-api
  rules:
  - alert: PostmortemShieldF001
    expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{service="payment-api"}[5m]))
      by (le)) > 0.75
    for: 2m
    labels:
      severity: high
      incident_id: pm-2026-03-11-payment-api
      finding_id: F001
    annotations:
      summary: Autoscaling ceiling delayed recovery under burst traffic.
      description: HPA hit maxReplicas=12 for 11 minutes while p95 latency stayed
        above 900ms.
      traceability: postmortem://pm-2026-03-11-payment-api#F001
  - alert: PostmortemShieldF002
    expr: sum(rate(http_requests_total{service="payment-api",status=~"5.."}[5m]))
      / sum(rate(http_requests_total{service="payment-api"}[5m])) > 0.03
    for: 1m
    labels:
      severity: critical
      incident_id: pm-2026-03-11-payment-api
      finding_id: F002
    annotations:
      summary: Readiness probes allowed stale Redis connections.
      description: 23% of restarted pods returned 5xx for the first two minutes after
        start.
      traceability: postmortem://pm-2026-03-11-payment-api#F002
  - alert: PostmortemShieldF003
    expr: sum(rate(http_requests_total{service="redis-cluster",status=~"5.."}[5m]))
      / sum(rate(http_requests_total{service="redis-cluster"}[5m])) > 0.03
    for: 5m
    labels:
      severity: medium
      incident_id: pm-2026-03-11-payment-api
      finding_id: F003
    annotations:
      summary: Cache failover chaos coverage was missing.
      description: No recorded game-day validating cache failover in the last 90 days.
      traceability: postmortem://pm-2026-03-11-payment-api#F003

metadata.title: Payment API latency spike during cache failover

artifacts.content:
apiVersion: kyverno.io/v1
kind: ClusterPolicy
metadata:
  name: shield-pm-2026-03-11-payment-api
  annotations:
    postmortem-shield/incident: pm-2026-03-11-payment-api
    postmortem-shield/findings: F001,F002,F003
spec:
  validationFailureAction: Audit
  background: true
  rules:
  - name: enforce-guardrails-f001
    match:
      any:
      - resources:
          kinds:
          - Pod
    validate:
      message: 'Finding F001: Autoscaling ceiling delayed recovery under burst traffic..
        Trace: postmortem://pm-2026-03-11-payment-api#F001'
      pattern:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app.kubernetes.io/name: payment-api
        spec:
          containers:
          - (name): '*'
            resources:
              requests:
                cpu: ?*
                memory: ?*
              limits:
                cpu: ?*
                memory: ?*
            readinessProbe:
              httpGet:
                path: ?*
                port: ?*
  - name: enforce-guardrails-f002
    match:
      any:
      - resources:
          kinds:
          - Pod
    validate:
      message: 'Finding F002: Readiness probes allowed stale Redis connections.. Trace:
        postmortem://pm-2026-03-11-payment-api#F002'
      pattern:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app.kubernetes.io/name: payment-api
        spec:
          containers:
          - (name): '*'
            resources:
              requests:
                cpu: ?*
                memory: ?*
              limits:
                cpu: ?*
                memory: ?*
            readinessProbe:
              httpGet:
                path: ?*
                port: ?*
  - name: enforce-guardrails-f003
    match:
      any:
      - resources:
          kinds:
          - Pod
    validate:
      message: 'Finding F003: Cache failover chaos coverage was missing.. Trace: postmortem://pm-2026-03-11-payment-api#F003'
      pattern:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app.kubernetes.io/name: redis-cluster
        spec:
          containers:
          - (name): '*'
            resources:
              requests:
                cpu: ?*
                memory: ?*
              limits:
                cpu: ?*
                memory: ?*
            readinessProbe:
              httpGet:
                path: ?*
                port: ?*

messages: YAML structural checks passed (kubectl present but no cluster reachable).

artifacts.content:
apiVersion: litmuschaos.io/v1alpha1
kind: ChaosEngine
metadata:
  name: shield-pm-2026-03-11-payment-api
  namespace: litmus
  annotations:
    postmortem-shield/incident: pm-2026-03-11-payment-api
    postmortem-shield/findings: F001,F002,F003
spec:
  appinfo:
    appns: default
    applabel: app=payment-api
    appkind: deployment
  chaosServiceAccount: litmus-admin
  engineState: active
  annotationCheck: 'false'
  experiments:
  - name: pod-network-latency
    spec:
      components:
        env:
        - name: TOTAL_CHAOS_DURATION
          value: '60'
        - name: RAMP_TIME
          value: '15'
        - name: TRACEABILITY_REF
          value: postmortem://pm-2026-03-11-payment-api#F001
  - name: pod-delete
    spec:
      components:
        env:
        - name: TOTAL_CHAOS_DURATION
          value: '60'
        - name: RAMP_TIME
          value: '15'
        - name: TRACEABILITY_REF
          value: postmortem://pm-2026-03-11-payment-api#F002
  - name: pod-delete
    spec:
      components:
        env:
        - name: TOTAL_CHAOS_DURATION
          value: '60'
        - name: RAMP_TIME
          value: '15'
        - name: TRACEABILITY_REF
          value: postmortem://pm-2026-03-11-payment-api#F003

messages: YAML structural checks passed (kubectl present but no cluster reachable).

artifacts.content:
package postmortem_shield.pm_2026_03_11_payment_api

import rego.v1

# Finding F001: HPA hit maxReplicas=12 for 11 minutes while p95 latency stayed above 900ms.
deny contains msg if {
  input.kind == "Deployment"
  input.metadata.labels["app.kubernetes.io/name"] == "payment-api"
  some i
  container := input.spec.template.spec.containers[i]
  not container.resources.limits.cpu
  msg := "F001 (Autoscaling ceiling delayed recovery under burst traffic.): deployment payment-api must define resources and probes [trace=postmortem://pm-2026-03-11-payment-api#F001]"
}

# Finding F002: 23% of restarted pods returned 5xx for the first two minutes after start.
deny contains msg if {
  input.kind == "Deployment"
  input.metadata.labels["app.kubernetes.io/name"] == "payment-api"
  some i
  container := input.spec.template.spec.containers[i]
  not container.resources.limits.cpu
  msg := "F002 (Readiness probes allowed stale Redis connections.): deployment payment-api must define resources and probes [trace=postmortem://pm-2026-03-11-payment-api#F002]"
}

# Finding F003: No recorded game-day validating cache failover in the last 90 days.
deny contains msg if {
  input.kind == "Deployment"
  input.metadata.labels["app.kubernetes.io/name"] == "redis-cluster"
  some i
  container := input.spec.template.spec.containers[i]
  not container.resources.limits.cpu
  msg := "F003 (Cache failover chaos coverage was missing.): deployment redis-cluster must define resources and probes [trace=postmortem://pm-2026-03-11-payment-api#F003]"
}
